nodes.label: Home Screen — Active State with Ritual Items + Dev Tweaks Panel
nodes.description: Home screen in active/focus mode showing app-blocking section for social media apps and ritual complements grid. Also shows 'Mentex Tweaks' developer panel overlaid on right side.

nodes.label: App Blocking Section — Social Media Toggles
nodes.description: App blocking list showing: Instagram (Red social, toggle ON/green), TikTok (Videos cortos, toggle ON/green), YouTube (Videos, toggle ON/green), X (Red social, toggle OFF), Facebook (Red social, toggle OFF). '+ Agregar apps' CTA at bottom.

nodes.label: Complementos del Ritual — Grid of Habit Tiles
nodes.description: 2-column grid of ritual complement tiles with 'Editar' action top-right. Tiles: Meditar (10 min, green checkmark), Leer (30 min), Estudiar (40 min), Respirar (5 min, green checkmark), Gratitud (3 veces), Entrenar (30 min), Journaling (15 min), Visualizar (5 min), Caminar (3 km), Suplementos (Hecho). Bottom CTA: 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min' in green pill button.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks — Developer Debug Panel
nodes.description: Developer panel 'Mentex Tweaks' overlaid on right side. Sections: AUTH (DEV) with navigation shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO with Home toggle (Inactivo/Activo, Activo selected), ACENTO color picker (teal/green color principal), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass selected, Líneas, Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA familia (Geist, Inter, Manrope).

nodes.label: Comenzar Jornada CTA Button
nodes.description: Full-width green pill CTA button at bottom: 'Comenzar jornada · 15 min'. Teal/green color. Initiates the focus session.

nodes.label: Home Screen State Machine — Inactivo vs Activo
nodes.description: Home screen has two primary states toggled via Mentex Tweaks: Inactivo (neutral cards, empty ritual, 'Sin apps protegidas' banner) and Activo (app blocking list, ritual complement grid, 'Comenzar jornada' CTA). State drives entire content layout.
